analyses.name: 3037.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely to STALL into earnings (71 days). Stock has decelerated to 0.73x and pulled back 13.9% from 3-month highs despite RS 97/99. Three consecutive beats (+48.8%, +50.07%) suggest high bar for next surprise. Volume expansion weak at 1.11x. Without a volatility contraction pattern (VCP), setup lacks the technical reset needed to sustain this 110% run. Consolidation or pullback probable before earnings catalyst.
analyses.catalyst: Earnings surprise magnitude in 71 days is critical. Last two quarters delivered +48.8% and +50.07% beats—next report must clear this elevated hurdle to reignite momentum. Watch for guidance on forward growth; miss or flat guidance could trigger sharp unwind given extended valuation already priced in.
analyses.risk: Momentum deceleration (0.73x) + absence of VCP + -13.9% pullback from highs = exhaustion setup. Profit-taking into earnings is high-probability. If sentiment shifts or sector 0052.TW weakens, this RS #1 could give back 15–25% before finding support. Earnings miss would be catastrophic given earnings expectations are already elevated.

analyses.name: 2344.TW
analyses.outlook: 2344.TW exhibits exceptional momentum with 5x acceleration and RS 90/99, but critical warning: stock is only 4.4% below 3-month highs with no VCP setup detected—suggesting extended condition entering 30–60 day window. The 78-day earnings gap removes near-term catalyst support. Prior quarter's -42% surprise and 3/4 beat rate inject uncertainty. Momentum likely to consolidate or pullback unless volume expansion sustains above 1.35x. Watch for breakout beyond $135–136 resistance or breakdown below $125 support—either signals next 60-day direction.
analyses.catalyst: Next earnings in 78 days is OUTSIDE the 30–60 day window, eliminating primary catalyst. Most actionable near-term monitor: daily volume expansion above 1.5x sustained on price holds above $130. Volume is the only real-time confirmation tool available; any sharp drop in volume on up-days flags momentum exhaustion.
analyses.risk: Extended position (4.4% from 3-month highs) + no volatility contraction pattern + largest prior earnings miss (-42%) = high risk of mean reversion pullback to $115–120 support without a confirmed breakout above resistance. Momentum deceleration or sector rotation away from 0052.TW could trigger rapid unwinding given the 48% 1-month run-up.

analyses.name: 2337.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely to STALL in 30–60 days. +513% relative strength is extreme; stock down 10.4% from both 3-month and 52-week highs despite +78% in 3 months—classic overextension without VCP setup. Momentum acceleration at 0.85x (decelerating) + volume expansion lagging at 0.90x confirm weakening thrust. Earnings in 21 days will likely act as volatility release valve rather than continuation catalyst.
analyses.catalyst: MONITOR earnings surprise history for 2337.TW. Pre-earnings setup is POOR: no volatility contraction pattern detected, momentum already peaked relative to index (+513% is unsustainable), and pullback into earnings removes cushion. Watch for earnings beat to re-ignite; miss will trigger sharp reversal. RS Rank #3 provides no edge if guidance disappoints.
analyses.risk: Earnings miss or guidance cut in 21 days. Given extreme prior momentum and lack of consolidation, any negative surprise will accelerate downside fast. Volume expansion at 0.90x (below average) means selling will likely be concentrated and painful. Stock is vulnerable to mean reversion—pullback to -20 to -30% from current levels would be normal technicals.

analyses.name: 2360.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely STALLS next 30–60 days. Despite 99/99 RS and 112% 3M return, deceleration (-0.08x) and -13.6% pullback signal exhaustion. VCP at 2/4 score suggests consolidation rather than breakout fuel. Volume contraction (0.77x) and 1M decline (-3.1%) confirm momentum weakening ahead of 73-day earnings cycle.
analyses.catalyst: Earnings beat streak (4/4 consecutive) is strongest lever—watch for 73-day catalyst to reignite. However, surprise magnitude is SHRINKING (+1.57% → +0.02%), signaling diminishing market reaction. Focus on revenue growth narrative and guidance—beat alone insufficient without acceleration signal.
analyses.risk: Extended valuation after 585% RS outperformance vs benchmark. Sector rotation (0052.TW) could reverse if tech/semis weaken. Momentum collapse most dangerous: if volume fails to expand on any bounce attempt before earnings, expect -8–12% retest of 52-week lows.

analyses.name: 2383.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely to STALL over 30–60 days. Despite RS #5 and 94/99 rating, momentum acceleration has decelerated to 0.48x and volume expansion sits weak at 0.79x. Stock is -12.8% from both 52-week and 3-month highs, signaling late-stage move exhaustion. Absence of VCP pattern removes key technical confirmation. Earnings in 72 days arrives outside primary window but critical—0/4 beats and consistent negative surprises (-6.4% to -8.3%) suggest elevated miss risk that could trigger sharp reversal.
analyses.catalyst: Monitor next earnings announcement (72 days out). With perfect 0/4 miss record and average -7.1% surprise, this is a potential landmine. Watch for any pre-earnings analyst estimate reductions in weeks 6–8 as a leading indicator of deteriorating fundamentals. This is the single actionable trigger to track for downside breakout.
analyses.risk: Decelerating momentum combined with overhead resistance (-12.8% pullback from highs) creates mean-reversion trap. If volume fails to re-expand and momentum continues deteriorating below 0.48x, synthetic breakdown below recent support becomes high-probability within 60 days. Earnings miss catalyst amplifies downside potential.

analyses.name: 2408.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely CONTINUES 30–60 days. 5x acceleration, +377% RS vs benchmark, and RS rank #6 signal sustained institutional accumulation. However, -13.6% pullback from 3-month high after +45% 1-month move suggests profit-taking phase—watch for stabilization above $265 support. Volume expansion (1.13x) is modest for this move; strong retest required to confirm continuation.
analyses.catalyst: Earnings in 35 days is CRITICAL. Pre-earnings setup shows overheating (no VCP, extended move). Historical beat/miss data unavailable, but Taiwan semiconductor sector visibility is typically high. Monitor guidance revision signals 2–3 weeks pre-earnings; negative revisions could trigger -8–12% flush despite momentum.
analyses.risk: Absence of VCP (volatility contraction) before 377% RS outperformance is RED FLAG—suggests parabolic move without base-building. Sector rotation (0052.TW exposure) or broader Taiwan tech weakness could collapse momentum. Post-earnings volatility spike probable; stock prone to sharp reversal if miss occurs.

analyses.name: 2308.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely STALLS in 30–60 days. RS Rank #7 and 92/99 rating are exceptional, but deceleration (0.44x) + 14.8% pullback from 3-month high + weak volume expansion (0.80x) signal exhaustion. VCP score 2/4 suggests tight setup, but lacks explosive catalyst confirmation. Next earnings (72 days) arrives just outside window—no near-term surprise trigger. Prior 4 quarters show 50% beat rate with last two quarters negative (–11.83%, –6.14%), limiting bullish surprise probability.
analyses.catalyst: Volume spike above 1.25x 20-day average on move above $2,310 (14.3% resistance) would confirm VCP breakout and extend momentum. Watch for institutional re-entry signaling. Without this, stock consolidates sideways through earnings window.
analyses.risk: Momentum deceleration combined with negative earnings drift (last two quarters) creates sharp reversal risk if stock breaks below $1,720 support. Sector rotation (0052.TW) weakness could trigger cascade; +406.89% outperformance vs 0050.TW is unsustainable and prone to mean reversion.

analyses.name: 2313.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely to CONTINUE 30–60 days. VCP breakout-ready (4/4 score, 18% tight consolidation) with RS #8 dominance (+322% vs benchmark). However, deceleration (-0.08x) and -11.9% pullback from 3-month high suggest consolidation phase before next leg. Volume expansion at 0.96x is sub-optimal. Earnings in 80 days outside window but 50% earnings beat rate provides modest support. Key: breakout above $259 resistance required to reignite acceleration.
analyses.catalyst: BREAKOUT ABOVE $259 WITH VOLUME SURGE (>1.2x 20-day avg). This is the trigger—VCP setup is primed but needs conviction. Volume expansion currently lagging at 0.96x. Watch for breakout on next 2–3 days; if achieved with volume, momentum resumes strongly into earnings runway.
analyses.risk: MOMENTUM STALL if breakout fails and price drops below $230 support. Deceleration already evident (-0.08x); combined with 50% earnings miss history and 11.9% recent drawdown, extended consolidation or breakdown could trigger institutional profit-taking before 80-day earnings event.

analyses.name: 2327.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely STALLS 30–60 days. Stock is extended at 52-week and 3-month highs with +58% 1-month return and 2.0x acceleration—classic late-cycle exhaustion. No VCP detected signals lack of consolidation. Volume expansion (+1.35x) is modest for this move magnitude. Post-earnings volatility in 33 days will likely trigger profit-taking or disappointment correction.
analyses.catalyst: Earnings in 33 days is the critical inflection point. Watch for pre-earnings pullback to 50-day MA (~$420–430) as institutional trim signal. Beat/miss probability unclear without surprise history, but consensus typically priced-in given +163.75% RS outperformance vs 0050.TW—any miss triggers -15% to -25% snap.
analyses.risk: Overextension and momentum reversal. Stock trading at all-time highs with zero pullback room; 2.0x momentum acceleration is unsustainable. Sector rotation (0052.TW rotation out) or broader macro weakness could collapse this setup in days, not weeks.

analyses.name: 6770.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely to STALL in 30-60 days. While VCP 4/4 and +17.87% 1M return are bullish, momentum acceleration is decelerating at -3.00x and stock sits -21.4% below both 52-week and 3-month highs. Volume expansion at only 1.07x is insufficient to confirm sustained breakout. The sharp outperformance vs 0050.TW (+243.79% vs +86.53%) suggests tactical trade exhaustion rather than structural uptrend resumption.
analyses.catalyst: Watch for VCP breakout ABOVE the -21.4% drawdown high with volume >1.5x avg. This is the only condition that would validate the tight consolidation as accumulation. Without this specific breakout volume confirmation within 10-15 trading days, expect reversion toward support.
analyses.risk: Momentum deceleration combined with consolidation below key resistance creates head-fake risk. A failed breakout attempt on weak volume will trigger stop-loss cascade, accelerating the -5.49% 3-month underperformance into sharper drawdown. RS Rank #10 suggests crowded trade vulnerable to rotation.

analyses.name: 1303.TW
analyses.outlook: 1303.TW shows conflicting signals: VCP 4/4 suggests breakout readiness, but momentum is decelerating (-1.41x) and volume contracting (0.79x). The +177% YTD RS outperformance vs 0050.TW is impressive, yet -17% from recent highs signals consolidation fatigue. Next 30–60 days hinge on VCP breakout execution. Risk: earnings in 81 days fall just outside window, limiting near-term catalysts. 2/3 recent beats provide modest confidence, but last beat (+0.65%) shows small surprise magnitude.
analyses.catalyst: VCP breakout above recent 3-month high ($101.60+) with volume expansion >1.2x would confirm momentum continuation. Monitor for volume thrust in next 5–10 trading days—this is the critical tell for whether consolidation resolves bullish or bearish.
analyses.risk: Momentum deceleration (-1.41x) + sub-1.0x volume expansion despite VCP setup suggests institutional conviction is weakening. If breakout attempt fails in next 2–3 weeks, expect retest of $70 support; earnings gap timing (81 days) leaves near-term traders exposed to vacuum-of-catalyst drift.

analyses.name: 3036.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely to CONTINUE through 30–60 days. RS Rank #12 with 75/99 rating shows sustained relative strength vs 0050.TW benchmark. VCP 4/4 with 18% base depth indicates tight consolidation—textbook Minervini breakout setup. However, momentum acceleration decelerating (0.67x) signals the explosive phase may be moderating. Watch for clean break above 52-week high ($291) on volume expansion >1.69x to confirm acceleration resumption.
analyses.catalyst: Volume-confirmed breakout above $291 resistance (52-week high). Current price $263.5 is 9.6% below this level. A close above $291 on volume >1.5x 20-day average would signal institutional accumulation resumption and validate the VCP setup for 15–20% potential move.
analyses.risk: Momentum deceleration (0.67x) combined with -9.6% pullback from recent highs suggests profit-taking pressure. If price fails to hold $250 support or rolls over below the VCP base ($240 estimated), expect rapid stop-loss cascade and momentum reversal to bearish within 2–3 weeks.

analyses.name: 2426.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum is STALLING. After +234% in 3 months and +17.28% in 1 month, decelerating acceleration (0.22x) and volume expansion collapse (0.17x) signal exhaustion. Down 18.8% from recent highs with no VCP recovery pattern detected. Expect consolidation or pullback over 30–60 days unless new catalyst emerges. RS rating of 83 remains strong, but the absolute advance has outpaced supporting technicals.
analyses.catalyst: Watch for volume surge above 20-day average paired with breakout above $63.80 resistance. Without volume expansion confirmation, any bounce is suspect. Sector rotation into 0052.TW strength would be the only credible continuation signal. Monitor earnings/guidance if applicable within window.
analyses.risk: Momentum trap. Extended run-up (234% in 3M) with declining velocity and no volatility compression creates classic late-stage setup. Sector weakness in 0052.TW or profit-taking cascade could trigger -15–25% correction back to support.

analyses.name: 3044.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely CONTINUES through 30–60 days. VCP 4/4 + 3.36x acceleration + 13.97% 1-month return signals breakout readiness. Stock trading -13.5% below 52-week highs creates room for mean reversion. However, earnings in 80 days sits just outside window—mixed beat rate (2/4) and recent surprise volatility (-10.5% last quarter) introduce uncertainty into late-window price action.
analyses.catalyst: Watch for VCP breakout confirmation above -13.5% drawdown resistance (likely $541+). Volume expansion (1.17x) must sustain through breakout. Sector 0052.TW relative strength vs benchmark (+21.3%) is tailwind. Monitor 17% base depth hold—any compression signals institutional accumulation completion.
analyses.risk: Earnings timing (80 days) creates elevated volatility risk in 60-day window. Earnings surprise track record is poor (50% beat rate, last quarter -10.5% miss). If sector 0052.TW rotates out of favor before breakout confirmation, RS rating drop could cascade—stock is 13.5% extended from highs already.

analyses.name: 2330.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely CONTINUES through 30–60 days. 2330 shows accelerating momentum (1.22x) with +25.49% in 3 months and consistent outperformance vs benchmark (+106.3% vs +86.53% YTD). VCP detected at 17% base depth signals breakout-ready consolidation. Only -4.5% from recent highs and 4/4 earnings beats provide confidence. Earnings catalyst in 59 days aligns perfectly with your forward window.
analyses.catalyst: WATCH: Earnings release in 59 days with 4-quarter beat streak (avg +0.0725% surprise). Breakout above -4.5% resistance coupled with pre-earnings volume acceleration would confirm VCP breakout. Volume expansion currently at 0.91x—ANY jump above 1.10x on volume spike is the entry trigger.
analyses.risk: Volume expansion WEAK at 0.91x—momentum unconfirmed at scale. VCP score only 2/4 indicates shallow consolidation; false breakout risk is material. AI/semiconductor sector volatility could spike pre-earnings, killing consolidation setup before catalyst fires.

analyses.name: 2375.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely to STALL in 30–60 days. Strong 1-3 month returns (+17–19%) with 2.62x acceleration look impressive, but RS Rating (47/99) and Composite Score (47) are dangerously weak. Stock is underperforming benchmark (0050.TW) by 41.55 YTD despite 1-month pop. No VCP base detected means rally lacks structural support. Currently -6.8% from recent highs signals distribution phase beginning.
analyses.catalyst: Watch for violation of 50-day MA on volume expansion >2.0x. If stock closes below $97 on above-average volume, momentum cascade likely. Conversely, break above $110 with RS Rating improvement to 60+ would confirm continuation. Monitor 0052.TW sector relative strength—if sector underperforms, individual momentum evaporates fast.
analyses.risk: Lack of volatility contraction (no VCP) means no proper base accumulation. Weak composite/RS ratings suggest institutional participation absent. High probability of mean reversion pull-back to $95–98 range within 45 days if macro sentiment shifts. Volume expansion (1.90x) may already reflect final capitulation buy, not fresh accumulation.

analyses.name: 2428.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely CONTINUES 30–60 days. Stock shows 2.01x momentum acceleration, tight VCP (4/4 score), and 14% base depth—classic Minervini setup. Volume expansion (1.51x) confirms institutional accumulation. Only -4.1% from 3-month high suggests breakout imminent. However, RS Rating 45/99 and RS underperformance vs 0050.TW (+36% vs +86%) indicate relative weakness; this limits upside durability vs market.
analyses.catalyst: Watch for close above 3-month high ($220 zone) on volume >1.5x avg. This triggers VCP breakout confirmation. Also monitor sector 0052.TW relative strength—if it accelerates, 2428 becomes core momentum play. 30-day close above $220 = continuation; failure = early warning.
analyses.risk: RS Rating 45/99 is the critical vulnerability—stock is underperforming the market significantly. If broader Taiwan equities (0050.TW) retreat or rotate away from this sector, momentum evaporates fast. Position near 52-week high also leaves limited margin of safety; any 5–8% pullback from breakout invalidates setup.

analyses.name: 2302.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely CONTINUES 30–60 days. Stock shows 2.91x acceleration, 2.62x volume expansion, and tight VCP (4/4 score) — textbook breakout setup. However, RS Rating of 27/99 is weak; stock significantly underperforming 0050.TW (+15.13% vs +86.53% YTD). Consolidation is shallow (17% base depth), limiting upside runway. Watch for breakout confirmation above recent highs; failure to clear resistance suggests momentum exhaustion.
analyses.catalyst: BREAKOUT above -6.4% gap to 52-week/3-month highs (~$27.20+). Volume must sustain >2.5x average on breakout. This is the single gating event—without it, VCP loses credibility and stock reverts to base-building or pullback.
analyses.risk: RS Rating collapse risk. Despite strong absolute momentum, relative strength vs 0050.TW is severely lagging. Sector rotation or broad Taiwan market weakness could evaporate this outperformance quickly. Additionally, shallow consolidation means limited stop-loss room—any failed breakout triggers fast reversal to support.

analyses.name: 3055.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely to STALL within 30–60 days. Despite 3.4x acceleration and +65.69% 1M return, RS Rating (41/99) and Composite Score (40) are weak—lagging 0050.TW by 54.62 YTD. Missing VCP (volatility contraction) pattern typical of Minervini setups signals lack of institutional accumulation. Price at -5.4% from both 52-week and 3-month highs indicates exhaustion risk. Volume expansion (1.67x) supports near-term hold but insufficient for sustained breakout without fresh basing.
analyses.catalyst: Monitor daily close above prior 52-week high ($119.40 approx) with volume >2.0x 20-day avg. This would confirm institutional re-entry and invalidate exhaustion thesis. Sector rotation catalyst (0052.TW relative strength) is secondary; watch for institutional accumulation signals in daily bars.
analyses.risk: Momentum fade into profit-taking as stock remains extended from proper base. RS Rating collapse (41/99) vs benchmark suggests weak relative strength sustainability. Mean reversion pull-back to $105–$108 likely if market rotates or 0050.TW outperformance reverses. Absence of classic Minervini setup (no VCP) is structural red flag.

analyses.name: 3008.TW
analyses.outlook: Momentum likely to STALL in 30–60 days. RS Rating 33/99 is weak relative to 1-month +26.3% gain—classic divergence. No VCP confirms lack of healthy consolidation. Stock is -4.5% from 3-month high with 2.02x momentum acceleration, but significantly lagging sector (+86.53% vs +17.87%). Earnings in 28 days creates pre-announcement uncertainty; institutional rotation away from weak RS ratings typically accelerates into earnings. Expect profit-taking and mean reversion unless earnings surprise materially.
analyses.catalyst: Watch volume behavior into earnings (28 days). Volume expansion 1.81x is healthy but must sustain above 2.0x+ to confirm continuation. A drop below 1.5x with price holding is death knell—signals weak conviction. Earnings beat probability appears LOW given weak RS and no chart-based consolidation setup; miss or in-line guidance could trigger -8 to -12% pullback.
analyses.risk: Pre-earnings profit-taking combined with weak RS Rating (33/99) creates cascade risk. Stock is extended from its own 3-month high with no VCP safety net. Gap-down post-earnings if guidance disappoints is HIGH probability. Sector rotation risk (0052.TW outpacing this stock) suggests institutional money is elsewhere.
